data.role: Founder & Chief Software Architect / AI-Native Builder / 30 Years of Web
data.philosophy: *Bridgeberg — A software architect who believes in elegant systems over clever hacks, user-focused solutions over feature lists, and building things that last. Thirty years of craft, now amplified by AI.*
data.introText: I anchor my work in the fundamentals of software engineering, its purpose, and its utility. Since 1995, I've built over 1,000 websites and 50+ mobile apps. Since 2025, AI is not a tool I use — it's how I build.

philosophyItems.text: AI is a partner, not a shortcut.

data.blogDescription: Writing about AI-native development, web architecture, CMS design, and lessons from 30 years of building.
data.projectsDescription: In 2026, building @webhouse/cms — an AI-native content management system. Leading WebHouse's transition from legacy infrastructure to modern cloud-native tooling.
